alt: Three-toed sloth hanging from a rainforest tree branch
caption: Brown-throated sloths live in tropical rainforests from Honduras to Ecuador.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated sloth habitat image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2a/Bradypus_variegatus%2C_the_Brown-throated_Three-toed_Sloth_%2812687597105%29.jpg
